_comment: Order Prompt templates - contextual prompts that fire during order phases (15% chance). Filtered by order type, sea/land context, and campaign context.

prompts.title: Something Stirs
prompts.description: You hear rustling in the bushes nearby. Could be nothing. Could be trouble.

prompts.title: Distant Noise
prompts.description: A sound carries from the treeline. Too faint to identify.

prompts.title: Strange Light
prompts.description: A brief flicker of light in the darkness. Probably a firefly. Probably.

prompts.title: Shadow Below
prompts.description: Something large moves beneath the hull. Too big to be a fish.

prompts.title: Loose Rope
prompts.description: A rope swings free in the rigging. Cut loose, or just poorly tied?

prompts.title: Strange Sound
prompts.description: Unusual creaking from the hold below. Could be cargo shifting. Could be something else.

prompts.title: Off the Path
prompts.description: You spot what might be an old campsite through the brush. Worth investigating?

prompts.title: Bodies Ahead
prompts.description: You come across bodies in the field. Recent, from the look of them.

prompts.title: Floating Debris
prompts.description: Wreckage floats nearby. Could be from a merchant ship. Could be bait.

prompts.title: Smoke on the Horizon
prompts.description: A thin column of smoke rises in the distance. Not on your planned route.

prompts.title: Fresh Tracks
prompts.description: Horse tracks, headed away from the main road. Could be nothing.

prompts.title: Distant Sail
prompts.description: A sail appears on the horizon. Flying colors you don't recognize.

prompts.title: Struggling Soldier
prompts.description: One of the recruits keeps dropping his spear. He looks embarrassed.

prompts.title: Shortcut Offer
prompts.description: A veteran offers to show you a training technique the officers don't teach.

prompts.title: Strange Symptoms
prompts.description: A patient shows signs you've never seen before. Interesting case?

prompts.title: Medicine Shortage
prompts.description: The supplies are running low. You spot a field of herbs nearby.

prompts.title: Dispute Among Men
prompts.description: Two soldiers are arguing. Could escalate if ignored.

prompts.title: Tactical Opportunity
prompts.description: You spot terrain that could be advantageous. Mention it?

prompts.title: Whispered Rumor
prompts.description: You catch a fragment of conversation. Something about the officers.

prompts.title: Found Item
prompts.description: Something glints in the dirt. Might be worth picking up.
